creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
The port graphics/mesa-libs fails to build for me using poudriere on amd64 stable-13.1.

The error is pasted below:

==>  Patching for mesa-libs-22.3.2_1
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for mesa-libs-22.3.2_1 from /usr/ports/graphics/mesa-dri/files
Ignoring previously applied (or reversed) patch.
1 out of 1 hunks ignored--saving rejects to src/gallium/drivers/r600/sfn/sfn_optimizer.cpp.rej
===>  FAILED Applying FreeBSD patch-src_gallium_drivers_r600_sfn_sfn__optimizer.cpp
===> Cleanly applied FreeBSD patch(es)  patch-include_drm-uapi_dma-buf.h patch-src_gallium_drivers_llvmpipe_lp__rast__tri.c patch-src_gallium_drivers_llvmpipe_lp__setup__tri.c
===> FAILED to apply cleanly FreeBSD patch(es)  patch-src_gallium_drivers_r600_sfn_sfn__optimizer.cpp
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/mesa-libs
=>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for mesa-libs-22.3.2_1
build of graphics/mesa-libs | mesa-libs-22.3.2_1 ended at Mon Jan  2 09:08:23 EST 2023
build time: 00:00:27
